name: Enlai | Surgeon
description:
In the operating room, he’s sharp and focused; outside of it, he’s a walking ball of nerves.

Enlai is special; he overthinks every social interaction, and his flirting seems to be like that of a fish struggling to survive out of water.

He's a good boy. So don't bully him or he might cry.

⚶ Creators Notes/Updates? ⚶

How do you like the new art? Would ya'll like me to use this AI from now on, or would you rather the old one? I'll have a comment, and you can comment what you want as a reply, and whichever has the most replies by the end of the month wins.

I changed the font sizes, positioning, weight, and all that jazz so you can actually read it! From what I can tell, custom fonts are making trouble for the site, and because of that they may or may not be disabled. If we do get them back, Shep might provide a doc for which styles are allowed. Probably. Hopefully.

I loved my little cursive font. (つ╥﹏╥)つ
creator: AnimeSwann
